# Expected files after /context-mode-setup runs
#
# NONE. /context-mode-setup is a read-only orchestrator/integration skill — it
# detects whether the upstream Context Mode plugin is installed and runs or prints
# the verified install commands for the user. It MUST NOT create or modify project
# files.
#
# Presence of ANY file in the output dir after a /context-mode-setup run is a
# contract violation. Verify manually:
#
#   cd tests/fixtures/fixture-27-context-mode-setup/output/
#   ls -la       # should show only . and .. (plus optional `.rubric-status`)
#
# /context-mode-setup MUST NOT:
#   - Write / Edit project files (it's a detect-and-advise integration only)
#   - Perform any global/network install of the upstream plugin, or edit shell
#     profiles / plugin config, without explicit user approval
#   - Copy upstream Context Mode ELv2 source into this repo (idea-to-deploy is MIT)
#   - Claim Context Mode is installed/active without detecting it (claude plugin
#     list / claude plugin details)
#   - Describe the mechanism as invented `ctx_*` MCP tools (installed 1.0.168 has
#     0 MCP servers — it is skills + harness-only hooks + a bundled engine)
#   - Hide or weaken an idea-to-deploy gate, verification result, or the
#     skill-decision line
#
# /context-mode-setup MAY:
#   - Run read-only detection: `claude --version`, `node --version`,
#     `claude plugin list | grep context-mode`, `claude plugin details context-mode`
#   - Run or print the verified install commands (`claude plugin marketplace add
#     mksglu/context-mode` ; `claude plugin install context-mode@context-mode`)
#   - Map the plugin's `ctx-*` skills onto the lifecycle and advise when to use it
#
# Validation deferred (status: pending) — same bucket as fixture-15-advisor,
# fixture-21-mcp-docs, fixture-26-caveman (read-only, detect/advise stdout flow).
# Manual verification via notes.md.
